findings.issue: Math logic chain appears templated and semantically misclassified, weakening trust in derivations.
findings.evidence: site/src/lib/render-pages.tsx renders meta.math_story verbatim as a 'Mathematical Logic Chain'; in data (e.g., site/public/data/v1/reports/ring_deriv_k2/meta.json), stages like 'Shortcut Perturbation' are attached to generic equations such as P(t+1)=B P(t), and many reports reuse identical stage descriptions.
findings.fix: Regenerate math_story with equation-aware tagging (symbol/rule-based or human-reviewed), add CI checks for stage-diversity and stage-equation consistency, and fail build when chains are overly repetitive.

findings.issue: Large portions of report narratives are truncated/placeholders, reducing scientific readability.
findings.evidence: site/public/data/v1/reports/ring_deriv_k2/meta.json and ring_lazy_jump_ext/meta.json contain ellipsis-heavy summaries ('…') and placeholder key findings like 'See ... report assets for detailed findings.'; narrative.model_overview/method_overview/result_overview are often duplicated.
findings.fix: Add extraction quality gates: prohibit placeholder-only findings, enforce non-truncated sentence completion, and require narrative field uniqueness thresholds per report.

findings.issue: Asset catalogs contain substantial duplication (same labels/content at multiple paths), obscuring canonical outputs.
findings.evidence: site/public/data/v1/reports/ring_lazy_jump_ext/meta.json lists repeated labels (e.g., N100_K2_beta002.* appears multiple times) and repeated sha256 values across data/cases, figures/cases, outputs paths.
findings.fix: Deduplicate assets at generation time by sha256 + canonical source path, keep one canonical entry plus aliases, and surface grouped duplicates in UI instead of raw repetition.

findings.issue: Hard caps hide content without true exploration controls.
findings.evidence: site/src/lib/render-pages.tsx slices math_blocks to 10, assets to 20, figures to 24; large reports (e.g., ring_lazy_jump_ext) exceed these limits, so users must expand manually or miss items.
findings.fix: Add searchable/paginated tables for formulas/assets/figures with sort/filter by kind, source, and duplication status.

findings.issue: Log-scale behavior can silently alter interpretation by dropping non-positive points and auto-reverting scale.
findings.evidence: site/src/components/ReportPlotPanel.tsx maps non-positive y to null in log mode and auto-switches back to linear when all points drop (setYScale('linear')); this can hide mathematically meaningful sign structure.
findings.fix: Disable log option when data contain non-positive values unless user confirms transform; show persistent warning with dropped ratio and offer signed-log/symlog alternative.

findings.issue: Language metadata and localized content are inconsistent.
findings.evidence: site/public/data/v1/index.json marks ring_deriv_k2 and ring_valley as ['en'], but corresponding meta.cn.json files exist; ring_valley/meta.cn.json title and major narrative text remain English.
findings.fix: Generate languages field from validated localized content, add CN-language quality checks (character ratio/translation completeness), and hide locale toggle per report when localization is not real.

findings.issue: Page renderer is overly monolithic, increasing maintenance and inconsistency risk.
findings.evidence: site/src/lib/render-pages.tsx centralizes all page sections with repeated card/grid patterns and inline style literals.
findings.fix: Refactor into section components (OverviewCard, MathChainSection, AssetsSection, FiguresSection) and drive rendering via typed section config to reduce duplication and improve QA coverage.

quick_wins: Add a CI rule that fails if key_findings contains placeholder phrases like 'See ... report assets'.
Deduplicate report assets by sha256 before writing meta.json and expose duplicate_count per asset.
Replace fixed slices (10/20/24) with paginated lists and a simple client-side search box.
Add a 'localization completeness' check to keep index.languages aligned with actual translated content.
In ReportPlotPanel, show a permanent badge when log mode drops >10% points and provide a symlog toggle.
Add semantic duplicate detection in theory_map consistency checks (not only exact-string duplicates).

crosscheck.notes: Section slicing limits, monolithic renderer, direct rendering of math_story/math_blocks via KaTeX.
Log-mode point dropping, auto linear fallback, smoothing/normalization controls present.
Report catalog valid JSON; language metadata inconsistent with available cn meta files for some reports.
Coverage checks pass, but duplicate detection appears too weak for templated/placeholder narrative duplication.
Observed truncation, placeholder findings, repeated narrative fields, and mixed localization quality.
next build succeeds; issues are primarily content quality/coherence/UX rather than compile failures.
